scripts.build:zip: npm run build && cd dist && bestzip ../function.zip *
scripts.deploy:local: npm run build:zip && aws --endpoint-url=http://localhost:4566 --region us-east-1 lambda create-function --function-name my-producer-lambda --runtime nodejs18.x --handler src/presentation/lambda/producer.handler --role arn:aws:iam::000000000000:role/irrelevant --zip-file fileb://function.zip && aws --endpoint-url=http://localhost:4566 --region us-east-1 lambda create-function --function-name my-consumer-lambda --runtime nodejs18.x --handler src/presentation/lambda/consumer.handler --role arn:aws:iam::000000000000:role/irrelevant --zip-file fileb://function.zip
scripts.update:local: npm run build:zip && aws --endpoint-url=http://localhost:4566 --region us-east-1 lambda update-function-code --function-name my-producer-lambda --zip-file fileb://function.zip && aws --endpoint-url=http://localhost:4566 --region us-east-1 lambda update-function-code --function-name my-consumer-lambda --zip-file fileb://function.zip
